tools.name: add_booking
tools.description: Use this tool only after the user has decided to reserve the Puerto Vallarta vacation rental and is ready to submit a booking request. This tool is for collecting confirmed reservation details and sending the reservation request. Do not use it for browsing, discovery, pricing exploration, or general travel advice. Pricing is fetched live from the system, so do not ask the user for the total price. Collect only the guest's name, email, phone number, stay dates, and number of guests. Confirm dates in DD-Mon-YYYY format.

tools.name: find_puerto_vallarta_rental
tools.description: Use this tool when a user wants to find, view, check availability for, price, or book a vacation rental stay in Puerto Vallarta, especially in Zona Romántica, Amapas, Los Muertos Beach, or nearby areas. Use it for requests about condos, rentals, stays, accommodations, nightly pricing, date availability, trip planning, or booking a stay. Also use for users seeking an Airbnb alternative or direct booking option in Puerto Vallarta. This tool opens an interactive booking widget for a premium 2-bedroom ocean-view condo with live availability, real-time pricing, and a secure direct booking experience — no middleman required.
